markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.503 — Municipal, Motor, and Private Buses

The department shall issue without charge specialty license plates for municipal buses, motor buses, and private buses. The license plates must include the words “City Bus,” “Motor Bus,” or “Private Bus,” as appropriate.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 197, eff. January 1, 2012.*
